data.title: Cisco Ekes Out Wi-Fi 7 Lead in 2025 According to Dell'Oro Group
data.description: In 2026, the expansion of WLAN may face obstacles due to memory shortages. A report by Dell'Oro Group revealed this trend, with the group being a leading provider of market insights on telecommunications, security, networks, and data centers. The report highlighted potential challenges for WLAN growth, expected to impact industries relying on this technology. This news emerged from Redwood City, California, on March 13, 2026, indicating a significant concern regarding memory availability in the upcoming period.

data.title: PRIVACY ALERT: Figure Lending Corp Under Investigation for Data Breach of Nearly 1 Million User Records
data.description: An investigation is currently underway by Schubert Jonckheer & Kolbe LLP into a data breach that occurred, resulting in unauthorized entry into the personal data of a minimum of 967,000 individuals who are users of Figure Lending Corp and its affiliated companies including Figure Lending LLC, Figure Markets Credit LLC, and more.

data.title: New Whitepaper from Bell Integration explores how Autonomous Enterprises Unlock ROI at Scale
data.description: A recently published report provides practical advice for IT leaders aiming to implement autonomous enterprise capabilities through the use of AI, automation, and data-driven operations. The white paper titled "The Autonomous Enterprise: Architecting" has been released by Bell Integration in London on March 13, 2026, as announced via PRNewswire. The report offers insights on leveraging these technologies to achieve autonomous operations within organizations.

data.title: RPI Consultants' Yoga Flexible Software Strengthens AP Control with Intelligent Vendor Management
data.description: In Baltimore on March 13, 2026, RPI Consultants introduced Intelligent Vendor Management, an innovative AI-driven component for its Yoga for FSM accounts payable (AP) software. This feature aims to provide finance teams with enhanced oversight, clarity, and audit capabilities for invoice processing. The new addition is designed to offer increased control and transparency in managing vendor invoices.

data.title: Intertek Launches Comprehensive Digital Product Passport Services
data.description: Intertek, a prominent Total Quality Assurance provider to various industries globally, has introduced its updated Digital Product Passport (DPP) suite of services in London. The suite offers a wide range of services focused on assisting manufacturers, brands, and retailers in navigating the rapidly changing regulatory and sustainability environment linked to digital product passports and compliance with the circular economy. Mark Thomas, the Executive Vice President of Global Sustainability, unveiled this new suite, which aims to provide guidance on these matters.

data.title: Fraud victims targeted by scammers claiming to recover stolen money; online cybercrime poses serious threat.
data.description: A significant number of cybercrime victims are being targeted again by online scammers disguised as lawyers or professionals, offering to help recover their stolen money.

data.title: NAFTA linked to shortened US life spans, study says. Trade competition with Mexico tied to earlier deaths for factory workers.
data.description: Research findings reveal a correlation between the North American Free Trade Agreement (NAFTA) and increased trade competition with Mexico, resulting in a decrease in life expectancy for American factory workers. The study indicates that workers impacted by the trade policies experienced premature deaths compared to those unaffected by NAFTA, with the mortality rate rising by X% among this group. This highlights the significant impact of trade agreements on the health and well-being of individuals in the workforce.

data.title: FLOKI price aims $0.000048-$0.000050 by April 2026. Trades at $0.00003019, RSI 50.91 neutral. Recovery predicted soon.
data.description: The cryptocurrency FLOKI is currently trading at $0.00003019, with the Relative Strength Index (RSI) standing at a neutral 50.91. Analysts predict a potential recovery for FLOKI to a range of $0.000048 to $0.000050 in the coming weeks as they observe signs of a possible reversal in its trend.

data.title: Novonesis issues EUR 1.7 billion senior unsecured notes
data.description: Novonesis closed a successful pricing for EUR 1.7 billion senior unsecured notes through Novozymes A/S on March 12, 2026. The issuance was part of the recently set up EUR 4 billion Euro Medium Term Note (EMTN) Programme on March 10, 2026.

data.title: SHIB price hovers around $0.000006, RSI at 52.29. Potential 8-25% growth despite bearish MACD signals for SHIB holders.
data.description: The cryptocurrency Shiba Inu (SHIB) is currently trading at $0.00000599, with a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 52.29. Technical analysis indicates a possible 8-25% increase towards the resistance level. However, bearish signals from the Moving Average Convergence Divergence (MACD) indicator advise caution for investors interested in Shiba Inu.

data.title: Will S&P 500 Open Up Or Down On March 13?
data.description: On Thursday, the S&P 500 reached its lowest close of the year 2026 due to statements made by Iran's new Supreme Leader, Mojtaba Khamenei, regarding the necessity of keeping the Strait of Hormuz closed as a means of pressuring adversaries. This development led to a rise in oil prices and caused concern among investors. The Polymarket, based on Polygon (CRYPTO: POL), is evenly divided as Friday approaches. The market predicting the performance of the S&P 500 on March 13 stands at 34% for "Up" and 66% for "Down," with an early trading volume amounting to $38,435. This figure is essential for understanding the current state of the benchmark index.

data.description: Toncoin is currently being traded at $1.30 with a downward momentum. Analysts predict a potential increase to $1.73 by March. Technical indicators reveal a neutral Relative Strength Index (RSI) of 44.90, indicating a key resistance level at $1.36.

data.title: SUI expected to hit $1.15 by March 2026. Currently trades at $1.02, aiming to break resistance. $0.92 support key for uptrend.
data.description: The stock of SUI is currently trading at $1.02, showing signs of bullish momentum. Analysis indicates a potential target of $1.15 if resistance is surpassed, while it is crucial to hold the $0.92 support for the uptrend to persist.
